report.summary: Cycle-close v15: Zero commits or deploys this cycle. Codebase stable — 46 TS errors unchanged (3 files), 103/502 published slugs still missing page.tsx. All 6 API routes structurally healthy with proper cache TTLs and fallbacks. Deploy drift now 7 days (last commit Mar 17) — P0 blocker persists.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: No new pages built or published this cycle — zero delta from v14
Page audit: 399/502 published slugs have page.tsx files (79.5%); 103 still missing
TypeScript: 46 errors across 3 files (structured-data.examples.ts, crypto-arbitrage page, crypto-index-funds page) — unchanged
No new regressions introduced — codebase is static since Mar 17
Build config present: NODE_OPTIONS max-old-space-size=8192, webpack mode

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally sound: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s), trending (5m), fear-greed (10m), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (5m), defi-yields (5m)
All routes have stale-while-revalidate headers and fallback data for API failures
CoinGecko endpoints (4 routes): free tier, no API key — rate limit risk on heavy traffic remains
DefiLlama integration via shared lib (@/lib/defillama) with proper error handling
No rate limit incidents detectable from code review — would need production logs for live confirmation

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'
Deploy drift: 7 days — no commits since Mar 17, Vercel auto-deploys from git so production matches latest commit
No build failures in current codebase (46 TS errors are in non-blocking example/guide files)
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from sandbox (egress blocked to degen0x.com)
No infrastructure changes or config drift detected in codebase

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: Nothing — zero commits, zero publishes
Carry-over from previous cycles: 103 missing page.tsx files, 46 TS errors to fix, deploy drift cleanup
P0 Blocker: 7-day deploy drift — last meaningful work was Mar 17. No active development detected.
P1: 103 published slugs without page.tsx will 404 in production — needs page scaffolding sprint
P2: 46 TypeScript errors should be cleaned up before next feature sprint
